subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest how the Wronged One is imprisoned in the most desolate of lands, inasmuch as He summoned all men unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی تری المظلوم سجن فی اخرب البلاد بما دعا العباد الیک و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for spiritual recognition
